pi_items.source: Official LimeSurvey API documentation (api.limesurvey.org/classes/Survey.html) states valid format codes are: A (All in one), G (Group by group), Q (Question by question), I (Inherit). There is no 'S' code.
Task description states 'enable the progress bar'; LimeSurvey API accepts Y/N/I for this property
Task description states 'DISABLE the Previous button'; LimeSurvey API accepts Y/N/I for this property
Task description states 'hide the No answer option'; LimeSurvey API accepts Y/N/I for this property
Task description, setup_task.sh line 27 specifies email notifications to 'concept-alerts@beverageco.com'
Task description states 'Set the Start Date to February 1, 2025'
Task description states 'Expiry Date to March 15, 2025'
Exact phrase from task description line describing welcome message
Exact phrase from task description welcome message: 'This survey takes approximately 7 minutes'
Exact phrase from task description end message: 'Your feedback directly influences our product development decisions'
Substring match of task description End URL: 'https://panel.researchportal.com/complete?status=1&sid={SID}'

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic LimeSurvey configuration task. The survey title is 'Sparkling Water Concept Test - Wave 3'. The task requires configuring survey settings including format (should be Q for Question by Question, not S), progress bar enabled (Y), previous button disabled (N), no answer option hidden (N), admin email as concept-alerts@beverageco.com, start date February 1 2025, expiry date March 15 2025. Welcome text includes 'Sparkling Water Concept Evaluation' and '7 minutes'. End text includes 'product development decisions'. End URL is panel.researchportal.com/complete. CRITICAL FINDING: The metadata claims format code 'S', but official LimeSurvey API documentation specifies the correct code for 'Question by Question' is 'Q', not 'S'. This is a contradiction in the task metadata.
